subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Bulbulu'l-Firaq (Tablet of the Nightingale of Bereavement)
subcodes.first_line: The nightingale of separation, perched upon the branch of the horizon, calls out in grief, you who are filled with yearning
subcodes.first_line_orig: بلبل الفراق علی غصن الافاق ینادی هذا الفراق یا ملا الاشتیاق و طیر الوفا یتغن
subcodes.subjects: @banishment to; life in Baghdad, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @call to action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @symbolism, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
